title: Largest3 Same Digit Number String
problem:
You are given a string num representing a large integer. An integer is good if it meets the following conditions:
It is a substring of num with length 3.
It consists of only one unique digit.
Return the maximum good integer as a string or an empty string "" if no such integer exists.
A substring is a contiguous sequence of characters within a string.
There may be leading zeroes in num or a good integer.
Input: num = "6777133339"
Output: "777"
"777" is the largest, so we return "777".
public String largestGoodInteger(String num) {
String[] numbers={"999","888","777","666","555","444","333","222","111","000"};
for(String i:numbers){

solutions.solution:
class Solution:
    def largestGoodInteger(self, num: str) -> str:
        """
        Find largest 3-digit substring with all same digits.
        
        Time: O(n), Space: O(1)
        
        Approach: Sliding window - check each 3-char window
        
        Args:
            num: String representing large integer
        
        Returns:
            Largest good integer as string, or "" if none exists
        
        Examples:
            >>> sol = Solution()
            >>> sol.largestGoodInteger("6777133339")
            "777"
            >>> sol.largestGoodInteger("2330300017779")
            "777"
            >>> sol.largestGoodInteger("42352338")
            ""
        """
        max_good = ""
        
        # Scan through string with sliding window of size 3
        for i in range(len(num) - 2):
            # Check if all three digits are the same
            if num[i] == num[i+1] == num[i+2]:
                good = num[i:i+3]
                
                # Update max if this is lexicographically larger
                if not max_good or good > max_good:
                    max_good = good
        
        return max_good
    
    def largestGoodIntegerAlt(self, num: str) -> str:
        """
        Alternative approach: Check from largest to smallest.
        More efficient if we expect to find a large digit early.
        
        Time: O(n) worst case, Space: O(1)
        """
        candidates = ["999", "888", "777", "666", "555",
                     "444", "333", "222", "111", "000"]
        
        for candidate in candidates:
            if candidate in num:
                return candidate
        
        return ""

# Example usage
if __name__ == "__main__":
    sol = Solution()
    
    num1 = "6777133339"
    print(f"Largest good integer: {sol.largestGoodInteger(num1)}")  # "777"
    
    num2 = "2330300017779"
    print(f"Largest good integer: {sol.largestGoodInteger(num2)}")  # "777"
    
    num3 = "42352338"
    print(f"Largest good integer: {sol.largestGoodInteger(num3)}")  # ""
